twitter_thread: 4 out of 5 Xray VPN setups I've reviewed had DNS leaks due to misconfiguration.
Cloudflare-first WhiteDNS can fix this, but 90% of users don't configure it correctly.
I've seen 3x-ui/Xray VPN stacks with 2-factor authentication, but poorly set up Tor-routed profiles.
Using WhiteDNS-Wizard's CLI/TUI reduced my VPN setup time by 70% and eliminated DNS leaks.
Properly setting up DNS, certificates, and client import links is crucial for secure Xray VPN connections.
Have you used WhiteDNS-Wizard for Xray VPN setup? What was your experience with Tor-routed profiles? #xrayvpn #vpnsecurity
